description: Active minimal release-readiness batch for the current agent-acceptance repository.

tasks.title: Release docs present
tasks.command: python -c "from pathlib import Path; files=['docs/RELEASE_VERIFICATION_CHECKLIST.md','docs/OPERATOR_RUNBOOK_INDEX.md','docs/NEXT_AGENT_HANDOFF.md']; raise SystemExit(0 if all(Path(f).exists() for f in files) else 1)"

tasks.title: Compile core governance scripts
tasks.command: python -m py_compile tools/ai_guard.py tools/go_evidence.py scripts/validate_workflow_closure.py scripts/validate_paper_task.py scripts/memory_compiler.py scripts/memory_lint.py

tasks.title: Dispatch and runner policy set
tasks.command: python -c "import time; time.sleep(0.2)"; python -m pytest tests/test_dispatch_result_schema.py tests/test_flow_outcome_schema.py tests/test_taskspec_schema.py tests/test_runner_contract_schema.py tests/test_runner_state_schema.py tests/test_runner_step_result_schema.py tests/test_dispatcher_policy.py tests/test_next_taskspec_consumption_policy.py tests/test_run_until_terminal_policy.py tests/test_terminal_state_policy.py -q

tasks.title: Release queue points to batch-release-readiness.json
tasks.command: python -c "import json, pathlib, sys; q=json.loads(pathlib.Path('agent-workqueue/release-readiness.queue.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8')); sys.exit(0 if q['items'][0]['task_file']=='scripts/examples/batch-release-readiness.json' else 1)"
